# Tabrez Dal — Product Designer & Frontend Engineer

Senior Product Designer and Frontend Engineer based in Dubai with 5+ years of experience building SaaS platforms, enterprise dashboards, and mobile apps for clients in UAE, India, USA, Canada, and UK.

## About

Product Engineer who designs and builds end-to-end digital products. Sole designer and primary frontend engineer on multiple shipped production platforms across hospitality SaaS, healthcare enterprise, HR tech, food delivery, EdTech, and motorsports.

## Case Studies

- [MyCricle — White-Label Hospitality SaaS](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/mycricle)
- [JobzShala — 6-Portal HR Tech Platform](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/jobzshala)
- [EatExpress — UAE Food Delivery App](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/eatexpress)
- [IEHP Care Manager Dashboard](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/iehp-cmm)
- [IEHP Healthcare Scholarship Fund](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/iehp-hsf)
- [MyHabit — Habit Tracking App](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/myhabit)
- [MenuOnline — Restaurant SaaS](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/menuonline)
- [EdXplore Admin Panel](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/edxplore)
- [MECO Motorsports](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/meco-motorsports)
- [Hotel & Resort Management](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/hotel-resort-management)
- [ASIN Vault Chrome Extension](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/asin-vault)
- [Mobiotics OTT Website](https://tabrezdal.com/case-study/mobiotics)

## Skills

Design: Figma, Design Systems, Token Architecture, Prototyping, WCAG Accessibility
Engineering: React 18, TypeScript, Angular, MUI, GraphQL, AG Grid, Firebase
